title: Monday Dev Free instance
excerpt: Does monday provide free plans for developers to create apps on monday Dev product?. As for now I have to create new account every two weeks (free trial unlocks access to pro plan for 14 days) just to test my apps.

posts.author: paulnguyendss (Nguyen Tuan Nghia)
posts.cookedHtml: Does monday provide free plans for developers to create apps on monday Dev product?. As for now I have to create new account every two weeks (free trial unlocks access to pro plan for 14 days) just to test my apps.
